title: Converting Data Transformations to Optimized SQL Queries
scenario: Translate data transformations (e.g., data cleaning, aggregation, filtering) into optimized SQL queries. The input may include multiple transformations, and the output should demonstrate an understanding of SQL query optimization techniques.
constraints: Must optimize the query for performance
Must apply transformations in the correct order

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output optimizes the query for performance.
Check if the output applies transformations in the correct order.
Check if the output uses correct SQL syntax.
